title: Tails wagging in waiting at Odin
description: GEORGE NEWS - Odin is a passionate...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Odin is a passionate non-profit dedicated to educating pet owners and helping lovable dogs, cats, puppies and kittens find their perfect match.


> The premises is alive with wagging tails and hopeful hearts.


This is where animals wait to meet their forever families. To find out more, adopt a pet or get involved, contact Colleen Smith on 072 084 1374.

Sonic is an energetic, gorgeous collie cross.

Shadow is the perfect family dog, eager to please, well behaved and socialised

Bryno is a friendly and smart little man, well socialised and eager to please.

Zen is a typical Jack Russell at his peak. He is about four years old and very sociable.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
